task_objective: Decompose the monolithic SDHLudusaviService class to respect the Single Responsibility Principle (SRP).
design_decisions: Decomposed the monolithic SDHLudusaviService class (~1,400 lines) into smaller, single-responsibility manager classes: PersistenceManager, ProcessWatchdog, HistoryManager, GameRegistryMatcher, OperationCoordinator, LudusaviGateway, and DiagnosticLogBuffer.

Mapped properties on the manager classes to delegate back to the service instance dynamically to support direct mutations and backward compatibility with the existing test suite's extensive mock tests.
Removed circular property structures in SDHLudusaviService by using simple instance attributes that sub-managers access directly, resolving circular recursion and initialization ordering issues.
Preserved hierarchical logging layout under 'sdh_ludusavi.service' (e.g. 'sdh_ludusavi.service.persistence') to ensure standard logging captures and tests continue to work correctly.

Mutated collections (like games, aliases, and ids) in-place during refresh cycles so that matchers holding references automatically see the refreshed state rather than referencing stale empty structures.
results: All 333 tests passed successfully. Ruff check and format pass completely. Ty checks pass with zero diagnostics.
